license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.73yhqpw
title: Prototype Protocol
author: George Moberly

steps_raw.instruction: Add 200 μl SWS to the tube. Pipette to mix.
Place on the 50°C heat block for 30 minutes.
Immediately place on a magnetic stand and wait until the liquid is clear (~2 minutes).
Remove and discard all supernatant from the tube.
Remove from the magnetic stand. 1. Add 200 μl SWS to the tube. Pipette to mix.
